result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed. I have loaded the four specified datasets, merged them by the cohort identifier (NSID), and derived two age-specific income band variables, `inc25` and `inc32`, based on the provided metadata and requirements. Missing values were harmonised according to the specified rules (NAs converted to -3 and -1 preserved as Not Applicable). The resulting dataset, containing only the ID and the derived variables with appropriate factor labels, has been written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
